query:
SELECT id, slug, 
  (LENGTH(content) - LENGTH(REPLACE(content, 'PDFUp', ''))) / LENGTH('PDFUp') as pdfup_count,
  (LENGTH(content) - LENGTH(REPLACE(content, 'pdfup.io', ''))) / LENGTH('pdfup.io') as pdfup_io_count,
  (LENGTH(content) - LENGTH(REPLACE(content, 'PDFUP', ''))) / LENGTH('PDFUP') as PDFUP_count
FROM legal_pages;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4AvtuQasrcUbqPZ.root --database HUwJ6fxw58gKVZz5QkmFWk --execute SELECT id, slug, 
  (LENGTH(content) - LENGTH(REPLACE(content, 'PDFUp', ''))) / LENGTH('PDFUp') as pdfup_count,
  (LENGTH(content) - LENGTH(REPLACE(content, 'pdfup.io', ''))) / LENGTH('pdfup.io') as pdfup_io_count,
  (LENGTH(content) - LENGTH(REPLACE(content, 'PDFUP', ''))) / LENGTH('PDFUP') as PDFUP_count
FROM legal_pages;
